subject: [PATCH v3 24/28] nfsd: add a fi_connectable flag to struct nfs4_file

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, fi_connectable, to the nfs4_file structure in the Linux kernel's NFS server code. The flag indicates whether a filehandle should be encoded as connectable or not, based on whether subtree checking is enabled for the underlying directory delegation. This change addresses a specific requirement for handling CB_NOTIFY operations when no svc_export is available.
